0000100111001000 0100110010101110 1 -> sum: 0101011001110111, cout: 0
0111011010100100 1110101001100000 0 -> sum: 0110000100000100, cout: 1

0101001001011101 0111011100001010 0 -> sum: 1100100101100111, cout: 0
1111000100001110 1101001011000011 0 -> sum: 1100001111010001, cout: 1
0001100111110000 0111100101001001 0 -> sum: 1001001100111001, cout: 0
0000000000000000 0000000000000000 0 -> sum: 0000000000000000, cout: 0
1111111111111111 1111111111111111 1 -> sum: 1111111111111111, cout: 1
0000000000000000 1111111111111111 0 -> sum: 1111111111111111, cout: 0

0111111111111111 1000000000000001 1 -> sum: 0000000000000001, cout: 1
